ops.title: Eval refreeze rule (clean-slate era): deliberate, versioned, guarded, journaled
ops.body:
# Eval refreeze rule

The eval-v3 prereg/accrual apparatus (preregistered freeze dates, addendum counters, accrual targets) is **scrapped** as of 2026-07-16 ŌĆö see the clean-slate entry in the `EXP eval-v3` log. The frozen eval frame under `~/.cc-steer/eval/` is refreshed by this rule instead:

1. **Refreezes are deliberate and rare.** There is no scheduled refreeze. Refreeze only when the eval frame no longer represents the problem (data-integrity fix, major distribution shift, deliberate scope change) ŌĆö never as a side effect of a pipeline pass.
2. **The guards are the gate.** `freeze_eval` refuses to overwrite different content (`FrozenViolationError`) and refuses any frame with empty rendered context (`EmptyEvalContext`). Never delete a frozen file to "make it work" mid-task; a refreeze is its own explicitly-decided operation.
3. **Refreeze procedure**: (a) archive the current `~/.cc-steer/eval/` (move aside, e.g. to Trash with a dated name ŌĆö never edit in place); (b) re-export from the store (`cc-steer export --push`); (c) `cc-steer freeze-eval` (freezes gate + watcher from the fresh test splits); (d) re-run `freeze-eval` and confirm the idempotent no-op; (e) journal the shas + reason in cc-notes.
4. **Refreezing invalidates downstream state ŌĆö handle all of it**: the `probs/` cache is gone with the wipe (incumbents must be re-scored on the new frame before any gate comparison, or the retrain runs `--fresh-epoch`); any human-labeled golden packet built on the old frame is void and must be re-labeled; registry metadata `dataset_digest` values referencing the old frame no longer match `should_retrain`'s digest check, which forces a real retrain on the next pass ŌĆö expected, not a bug.
5. **Train/test hygiene is inherited**: the frame is the export's session-hash test split; the only leakage guard needed is the split itself.

Current frame (frozen 2026-07-16, clean-slate): gate `c7f923ebŌĆ”72a5` sha `c7f923eb83d0d850495d080d7951d144ffdb4055d332bb90c09dea1b64972ac5`, watcher sha `69249e2b5525750a752a80d6df0f453079a73c6db48d20c3e82d12092152b07e`; watcher train digest of record `f21c40cac0ad9f88`. Prior (eval-v2-era) frame preserved at `~/.Trash/cc-steer-eval-v2-wiped-20260716`.
ops.when: Before refreezing the eval frame, running cc-steer freeze-eval, or touching ~/.cc-steer/eval/ in any way
